name: Elegant Strawberry Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Heavy cream, whipped & sweetened OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, brown sugar, salt, and butter. Mix until crumbly, as for pie crust. Reserve 1 cup of crumbs.
2. In a separate bowl, combine egg, milk (or buttermilk), and baking soda; stir into remaining crumb mixture, blending well.
3. Pour the batter evenly into two greased, paper-lined 9-inch layer pans.
4. Sprinkle reserved crumbs over the batter, then top with chopped nuts.
5. Bake at 375°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely.
6. Reserve several whole strawberries for garnish. Slightly mash the remaining berries and sweeten to taste.
7. Place one layer of cake on a serving plate, nut side up.
8. Spread half of the mashed strawberries over the first layer, then dollop with half of the whipped cream (or Cool Whip).
9. Cover with the second layer of cake.
10. Spread the remaining mashed strawberries around the top edge of the cake, leaving a small circle uncovered in the center.
11. Garnish with clusters of whole strawberries around the bottom of the torte.
